description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a rich brown-orange exterior and a short, dark brown stem at the top. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing, stylized face featuring sharply angled eyes and a wide, jagged mouth, giving it a classic Halloween jack-o'-lantern appearance. The surface is slightly glossy with visible dimples and natural pumpkin texture, suggesting a realistic organic form. The back and sides are uncarved and smooth, with the stem centrally positioned on the top. The pumpkin appears solid and robust, with no visible openings other than the carved facial features. There are no additional decorations or accessories attached to the pumpkin.
description: A round, brown-orange pumpkin with a carved, sinister face and a short, dark stem. The surface is glossy and textured, with detailed facial cutouts on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face with sharp eyes and a jagged mouth, and the stem visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view with the stem visible and a partial glimpse of the facial cutout on the left edge; the rest of the surface is smooth.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a smooth, uncarved pumpkin surface with the stem at the top center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the stem visible and a slight hint of the facial cutout on the right edge; otherwise smooth.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with sharply angled, menacing eyes and a wide, jagged mouth. The pattern is expressive and bold, with deep cutouts for the facial features and no additional motifs or etchings.
